name: Wrongful death on job in West Valley - timeline?

mainEntity.name: Wrongful death on job in West Valley - timeline?

acceptedAnswer.description: Comp immediate, third-party suit within 2-4 years depending on claim.[7] Key factors: (1) No comp time limit for death; (2) Personal rep files; (3) Caps on non-econ damages; (4) Survival action too. Act fast on both. Lawyer files promptly.
